metric_caveats: Launch immediately when cap-25 promotion gates pass (monthly >=40%, schema 100%, evidence >=90%, no evidence-regression vs verify-repair cap-25 at runs/gan_s0_verify_repair_cap25_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T084511Z).
Cap-25 hold reference: runs/gan_s0_gpt4_1_mini_temporal_candidates_verify_repair_cap25_guardrails_validation_20260520T125302Z (44% monthly, 100% schema, 84% evidence).

Compare benchmark-facing metrics to hosted verify-repair v2 full runs/gan_s0_verify_repair_full_validation_gpt4_1_mini_20260519T084732Z (65.4% monthly, 92.7% evidence) and Qwen temporal v1.1 full runs/gan_s0_qwen35b_temporal_candidates_verify_repair_full_validation_guardrails_20260519T230324Z (65.8% monthly, 100% evidence).
Temporal candidates are deterministic diagnostic hints; gan_frequency_deterministic_v1 scoring is unchanged.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, temporal-candidate coverage, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
